content:
🎥 2. Weeks 11-12: Thematic Film Pairings

✔ Student-Voted Films (Selected Week 9, voted on in Week 10).
✔ Films should be contrasting in style and theme (Light vs. Dark / Structure vs. Chaos).
• Example: Week 11 → A film about strict structure, control, and rules.
• Example: Week 12 → A film about deconstruction, absurdity, and distortion.

🚀 Why “Dogtooth” Fits (Week 12)
• Themes: Language distortion, controlled reality, isolated narratives, unreliable authority.
• Paired Against: A film that represents strict structure and cultural normativity.

✅ Film weeks = mental breather, but deeply analytical.
✅ Scaffolds into the research project (Weeks 13-15).

📜 3. Weeks 13-15: Research, Peer Review & Final Projects
